name: TheLauncher
description: A folder-based desktop launcher that keeps your apps organized, your desktop clean, and everything one click away.
comments:
TheLauncher turns ordinary folders of .desktop files and documents into a polished launcher panel on your Cinnamon desktop.

Organize links the way you already think about them - work, utilities, games, or any structure you choose. Each desklet instance can point at its own folder, with subfolders, custom order, and light or dark themes.

- Natural, configurable organization - build a launcher layout from real directories instead of burying shortcuts in menus.
- A cleaner desktop - keep clutter off the wallpaper and put your apps in one place you control.
- Everything at your fingertips - launch what you need instantly instead of searching through application lists.

Copy files into your link folder or manage items from the Configure dialog. The filesystem is the source of truth; TheLauncher keeps the display in sync.

Acknowledgments: This whole project started when I was using Quick Links - Launcher by NotSirius-A, which is a great launcher, but I wanted a few more enhancements.
